final:
module binary_counter(
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      count <= 0;
    end else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
